summary: Final comprehensive verification of Mill Entry System - ALL FEATURES PASS (100%). Tested Python/FastAPI backend with 28/28 pytest tests passing. Verified frontend UI elements including Local Party (date filter, party select, settle, exports), Mill Parts (search bar, stock dialogs with current stock info), Cash Book (balance display in form), and Excel Import. All 3 backends (Python, Node.js local-server, Electron desktop-app) have matching route implementations for local_party and import_excel.

local_party.summary_endpoint: PASS - GET /api/local-party/summary with date_from/date_to params working
local_party.settle_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/local-party/settle creates payment + auto cash book nikasi
local_party.manual_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/local-party/manual creates debit entry with validation
local_party.delete_endpoint: PASS - DELETE /api/local-party/:id with cascade for settlements
local_party.frontend_ui: PASS - party dropdown, date filters, settle/print/manual buttons, export buttons all visible

mill_parts.stock_in_with_party: PASS - POST /api/mill-parts-stock auto-creates local party debit entry
mill_parts.edit_updates_local_party: PASS - PUT /api/mill-parts-stock/:id updates linked local party entry
mill_parts.frontend_search: PASS - data-testid='mill-parts-search' filters summary and transactions
mill_parts.frontend_stock_dialog: PASS - Stock In dialog shows current stock and after-stock preview

excel_import.preview_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/entries/import-excel with preview_only=true returns preview
excel_import.columns_detection: PASS - detects DATE, TRUCK, AGENT, MANDI, KG, BAG, etc.
excel_import.frontend_button: PASS - Excel Import button visible in Entries tab

cash_book.frontend_form_balance: PASS - New Transaction form shows current balance (₹-50,650) and after-balance preview

gunny_bags_local_party_auto.old_bag_purchase: PASS - POST /api/gunny-bags with old type + source auto-creates local party entry

backend_parity.nodejs_local_server: PASS - local_party.js and import_excel.js have matching endpoints with date_from/date_to support
backend_parity.electron_desktop_app: PASS - local_party.js and import_excel.js have matching endpoints using safeAsync/safeSync wrappers

test_data.parties: Bicky (4 txns, balance Rs.3500), TestParty1, Ramesh, titu

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 29 - FINAL comprehensive verification complete. All features pass: Local Party (summary/transactions/report with date filters, settle with auto cash book, manual purchase, delete with cascade, excel/pdf export), Mill Parts (search bar filters both summary and transactions, stock in/edit with auto local party creation, current stock display in dialog), Excel Import (preview with columns detection), Cash Book (balance display in form with after-balance preview). All 3 backends (Python/FastAPI, Node.js local-server, Electron desktop-app) verified with matching implementations.
